title: AIMS analysis artifact
description: Schema reference for validate_analysis.py. Validation is implemented in Python rather than a JSON Schema library to avoid runtime dependencies.

notes.data_source: Sorted comma-separated provider names, e.g. 'stooq' or 'csv,stooq'.
notes.data_freshness: Object mapping symbol to latest bar date (YYYY-MM-DD) or 'n/a' if no bars.
notes.rank: Display rank after reliability-aware ordering: reliable instruments (is_reliable=true) rank first by score descending; unreliable instruments follow.

optional_instrument_keys.canonical_id: Canonical instrument identifier from canonical_instrument_mappings.csv, e.g. 'spx'. Present when generate --mapping is used.
optional_instrument_keys.display_name: Human-readable instrument name from the mapping layer, e.g. 'S&P 500'. Present when generate --mapping is used.
